node_kinds.name: MDE_CVE
node_kinds.description: A Common Vulnerabilities and Exposures entry representing a unique security vulnerability found on one or more Entra-joined devices

node_kinds.name: MDE_User
node_kinds.description: A local or unknown user account with no Entra ID and no SID, observed logging on to a Defender-monitored device. ID is DOMAIN\accountName (synthetic; no existing BloodHound node match guaranteed).

relationship_kinds.name: MDE_FoundOn
relationship_kinds.description: A CVE is present on an AZDevice. Source: MDE_CVE node (matched by id). Target: AZDevice node (matched by deviceId property).

relationship_kinds.name: MDE_LoggedOnTo
relationship_kinds.description: A user credential is exposed on a device. Source: AZDevice node (matched by deviceId property). Target: AZUser or User node (matched by id). Attack path reads: compromise device → steal user credential.
